name: Proto Labs Inc
summary: PART I Overview Proto Labs, Inc. was incorporated in Minnesota in 1999. The terms Proto Labs, "Protolabs," the Company, we, us, and our as used herein refer to the business and operations of Proto Labs, Inc. and its subsidiaries. We are the worlds fastest manufacturing service enabling companies across every industry to streamline production of quality parts throughout the entire product life cycle.
